title: Armourer's Workshop Plugin
description: Cosmetic weapon and armour skins the plugin.
body:
![](http://plushie.moe/projects/armourers_workshop/images/aw_banner.png)

Create voxel-art to replace or add to the player model, equipment models, CNPCs, and more!

Create decoration blocks for your worlds.

Share your creations on a global library, or a sever specific one.

Direct management of player-equipped skins via commands, or let the player use a GUI.

Support via command/config for making most modded items skinable.

Elevate your server project to a whole new level of detail!


**NOTE: This a plugin version of the [Armourer's Workshop Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/armourers-workshop)**

[![](https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/Armourers%20Workshop%20Plugin.svg)](https://bstats.org/plugin/bukkit/Armourers%20Workshop%20Plugin/22668)

## How To Use:


For Plugin Server Owner:

1. install any bukkit server

2. install [Cocoon Server Library](https://modrinth.com/plugin/cocoon/versions?l=bukkit)

3. install [Armourer's Workshop Plugin](https://modrinth.com/plugin/armourers-workshop-plugin/versions)


For Client User of Plugin Server:

1. install fabirc/forge client

2. install [Cocoon Client Library](https://modrinth.com/plugin/cocoon/versions?l=fabric&l=forge)      **<-- Important**

3. install [Armourer's Workshop Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/armourers-workshop/versions)
